payload.description:
Critical reporting depends on champion ScoreVersions having associated COMPLETED Evaluation records via scoreVersionId. Suco - Home Improvement champion versions may have historical completed evaluations that were not linked, so score champion version timeline/reporting can miss performance data.

Behavior spec:
Feature: Champion evaluation association backfill
Scenario: Backfilling Suco champion versions
Given the Suco - Home Improvement scorecard has scores with champion versions
And completed evaluations exist for those champion versions but lack scoreVersionId associations
When the backfill is run for that scorecard
Then each eligible completed evaluation is associated to the correct champion ScoreVersion
And evaluations that cannot be confidently matched are reported without mutation
And no champion version is changed by the backfill.

Out of scope: champion promotion changes or weakening promotion safeguards.
payload.title: Backfill Suco champion evaluation associations
